text: if a discourse never resolves into a stable conclusion, there's probably a load-bearing element of the discourse that straight up doesn't matter

raw.full_text: if a discourse never resolves into a stable conclusion, there's probably a load-bearing element of the discourse that straight up doesn't matter

text:
example 1: 

pro-shipping vs anti-shipping, "fiction affects reality" vs "fiction doesn't affect reality"

it straight up doesn't matter if you ship fictional characters in a weird way. it doesn't have a material consequence outside this framing, so it doesn't resolve

raw.full_text:
example 1: 

pro-shipping vs anti-shipping, "fiction affects reality" vs "fiction doesn't affect reality"

it straight up doesn't matter if you ship fictional characters in a weird way. it doesn't have a material consequence outside this framing, so it doesn't resolve

text:
example 2:

DARVO and repressed/false memories of abuse

it actually doesn't matter if your memories of abuse or false or not; the treatments for getting better are the same whether the emotional distress is internally or externally afflicted

raw.full_text:
example 2:

DARVO and repressed/false memories of abuse

it actually doesn't matter if your memories of abuse or false or not; the treatments for getting better are the same whether the emotional distress is internally or externally afflicted
